problem id: 42e10376
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01000011 -> 10000100
  10001010 -> 00001000
  00101011 -> 10000010
  00100111 -> 10000010
  00100101 -> 10000010
  11010100 -> 00001101
  00001010 -> 00000000
  00000111 -> 10000000
  01001101 -> 10000100
  00110000 -> 00000011

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 00001100
